item.title: AVFCOfficial: Aston Villa @AVFCOfficial · 2s Aston Villa can confirm ticket details for our UEFA Europa League semi-final second leg a
item.description: Aston Villa @AVFCOfficial · 2s Aston Villa can confirm ticket details for our UEFA Europa League semi-final second leg against Nottingham Forest. De avfc.co.uk

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min There's an easy argument to make that Vincent Kompany ought to be on Manch
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min There's an easy argument to make that Vincent Kompany ought to be on Manchester City’s radar as the best, and most logical, appointment if this really is Pep Guardiola’s final season.
Unfortunately for Manchester City, there are all sorts of other considerations to take into Mostrar más 7 6 21 2 mil
